case_title: (MS.) MICHELLE YU VS. (MR.) BACH KIM CO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE BY DEFT RETURNED. IT IS AN EX PARTE COMMUNICATION AND NO $10.00 FEE. REQUEST UNTIMELY, RECEIVED BY THE COURT ON JUNE 27, 2008.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,340.00 FILED BY YU, (MS.) MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT CO, (MR.) BACH KIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, (MS.) MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CO, (MR.) BACH KIM $5,680.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,755.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PROPERTY LOSS AND LOSS OF USE IN THE SUM OF $3600.00, AND FOR BODILY INJURIES IN THE SUM IF $2080.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-22-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CO, (MR.) BACH KIM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2008 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUL-30-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CO, (MR.) BACH KIM
